'''âf-d-w''' ('''kafadaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbraid|umbraid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbraid|umbraid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-d-w
|-
! Lemma
| kafadaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifadaw|thifadaw]] || [[word:jifadaw|jifadaw]] || [[word:shifadaw|shifadaw]] || [[word:kifadaw|kifadaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufadaw|thuthufadaw]] || [[word:jujufadaw|jujufadaw]] || [[word:shushufadaw|shushufadaw]] || [[word:kukufadaw|kukufadaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufadaw|thufadaw]] || [[word:jufadaw|jufadaw]] || [[word:shufadaw|shufadaw]] || [[word:kufadaw|kufadaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufadaw|thufadaw]] || [[word:jufadaw|jufadaw]] || [[word:shufadaw|shufadaw]] || [[word:kufadaw|kufadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefadaw|thefadaw]] || [[word:jefadaw|jefadaw]] || [[word:shefadaw|shefadaw]] || [[word:kefadaw|kefadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofadaw|thothofadaw]] || [[word:jojofadaw|jojofadaw]] || [[word:shoshofadaw|shoshofadaw]] || [[word:kokofadaw|kokofadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofadaw|thofadaw]] || [[word:jofadaw|jofadaw]] || [[word:shofadaw|shofadaw]] || [[word:kofadaw|kofadaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofadaw|thofadaw]] || [[word:jofadaw|jofadaw]] || [[word:shofadaw|shofadaw]] || [[word:kofadaw|kofadaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfadaw|thĂŠfadaw]] || [[word:jĂŠfadaw|jĂŠfadaw]] || [[word:shĂŠfadaw|shĂŠfadaw]] || [[word:kĂŠfadaw|kĂŠfadaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafadaw|thathafadaw]] || [[word:jajafadaw|jajafadaw]] || [[word:shashafadaw|shashafadaw]] || [[word:kakafadaw|kakafadaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafadaw|thafadaw]] || [[word:jafadaw|jafadaw]] || [[word:shafadaw|shafadaw]] || [[word:kafadaw|kafadaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafadaw|thafadaw]] || [[word:jafadaw|jafadaw]] || [[word:shafadaw|shafadaw]] || [[word:kafadaw|kafadaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafadaw|shafadaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafadaw|goshafadaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafadaw|gokishafadaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafadawnĂŒ|shafadawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafadawnknĂŒ|goshafadawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadawnĂŒ|gokishafadawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafadawshĂ«|shafadawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafadawnkshĂ«|goshafadawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafadawshĂ«|gokishafadawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadawro|shafadawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadawnkro|goshafadawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadawro|gokishafadawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadawmu|shafadawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadawnkmu|goshafadawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadawmu|gokishafadawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafadawsher|shafadawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafadawnksher|goshafadawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafadawsher|gokishafadawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafadawng|shafadawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafadawnkng|goshafadawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafadawng|gokishafadawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafadawya|shafadawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafadawnkya|goshafadawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafadawya|gokishafadawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafadawyam|shafadawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafadawnkyam|goshafadawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafadawyam|gokishafadawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadawnĂŒshĂ«|shafadawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafadawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafadawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadawnĂŒro|shafadawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadawnknĂŒro|goshafadawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadawnĂŒro|gokishafadawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadawnĂŒmu|shafadawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadawnknĂŒmu|goshafadawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadawnĂŒmu|gokishafadawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadawshĂ«nĂŒ|shafadawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafadawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafadawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadawshĂ«ro|shafadawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadawnkshĂ«ro|goshafadawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadawshĂ«ro|gokishafadawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadawshĂ«mu|shafadawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadawnkshĂ«mu|goshafadawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadawshĂ«mu|gokishafadawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadawronĂŒ|shafadawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadawnkronĂŒ|goshafadawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadawronĂŒ|gokishafadawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadawroshĂ«|shafadawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadawnkroshĂ«|goshafadawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadawroshĂ«|gokishafadawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafadawromu|shafadawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafadawnkromu|goshafadawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafadawromu|gokishafadawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafadawmunĂŒ|shafadawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafadawnkmunĂŒ|goshafadawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafadawmunĂŒ|gokishafadawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafadawmushĂ«|shafadawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafadawnkmushĂ«|goshafadawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafadawmushĂ«|gokishafadawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafadawmuro|shafadawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafadawnkmuro|goshafadawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafadawmuro|gokishafadawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
